content_body: We had a really nice time here in this beautiful cabin for the month of September. We talked a lot, read several books, watched movies, played some games, visited Mercier Orchards and downtown Blue Ridge, waded in the creek, and watched the wildlife. Some of the special highlights of the trip were enjoying the still-warm peach fried pies from Mercier's, meditating out by the creek, watching the deer play in the yard, and taking a nap in the afternoon on the few days it rained. It was so peaceful!
title: Such a Peaceful Cabin!
